channel.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2022
item.description:
Community Resources

  • jupyter-map - Map of university institutions that use Jupyter.
  • kandi Kits Topic - Discover popular Jupyter libraries, top authors, trending project kits, discussions, tutorials & learning resources.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2022
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Google Colaboratory - Cloud-based Jupyter environment aimed at machine learning education and research.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2022
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab-tensorboard-prostars21 - TensorBoard support for JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jul 11th - Jul 17th, 2022
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Naas - JupyterLab environment with magic scheduling/notification functionality and assets/dependency/secrets management.

    • Visualization

  • ipyvizzustars621 - Animated data storytelling tool.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Official Resources and Documentation

  • Jupyter documentation
  • JupyterLab documentation

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 20th - Jun 26th, 2022
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • lineapystars398 - Extension for transforming messy Jupyter notebooks to production-ready pipelines with two lines of code.

    • Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Mercurystars2.1k - Convert notebooks into web applications.
  • nbconvert - Convert notebooks to other formats.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Visualization

  • ipycytoscapestars206 - Widget for interactive graph visualization in Jupyter using cytoscape.js.
  • ipydagred3stars41 - ipywidgetsstars2.6k library for drawing directed acyclic graphs in jupyterlab using dagre-d3.
  • ipywebrtcstars214 - Video/Audio streaming in Jupyter.
  • ipywidgetsstars2.6k - UI widgets for Jupyter.
  • ipysheetstars505 - Interactive spreadsheets in Jupyter.
  • IPySigmastars16 - Prototype network visualization frontend for Jupyter notebooks.
  • ipyvolumestars1.8k - 3D plotting for Python in Jupyter based on widgets and WebGL.
  • jupyter-manimstars185 - Display manimstars47.4k (Mathematical Animation Engine) videos or GIFs in Jupyter notebooks.
  • tributarystars5 - Python data streams with Jupyter support.
  • ipyregulartablestars70 - High performance, editable, stylable datagrids in Jupyter.
  • Perspectivestars4.9k - Data visualization and analytics component, especially for large/streaming datasets.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab-executorstars5 - Extension to execute scripts from the Jupyterlab file browser.
  • jupyterlab-kysostars1 - Extension to publish notebooks to the Kyso platform from Jupyterlab.
  • jupyterlab-notificationsstars35 - Customizable notebook cell completion browser notifications for JupyterLab.
  • jupyterlab_iframestars82 - View HTML as an embedded iframe in JupyterLab.
  • jupyter-fsstars125 - A filesystem-like content manager for multiple backends in Jupyter.
  • jupyter-notifystars562 - Cell magic for browser notification of cell completion.
  • jupyterlab_miami_nightsstars73 - Combination of VS Code's SynthWave '84 and JupyterLab's Neon Night themes.
  • jupyterlab_autoversionstars58 - Automatically version notebooks in JupyterLab.
  • jupyterlab_commandsstars39 - Add arbitrary python commands to the JupyterLab command palette.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Kyso - Data science platform to publish and share Jupyter notebooks as data blogs and web applications.

    • Community Resources

  • Mailing Lists - Jupyter General Mailing List, Jupyter in Education Mailing List
  • GitHub - Topics: jupyter, jupyter-kernels, jupyter-notebook, jupyterhub, jupyterlab, jupyterlab-extension
  • Gitter - Jupyter Gitter Chatroom

    • Runtimes/Frontends

  • voilastars4.4k - Notebooks as interactive standalone web applications.

    • Collaboration/Education

  • jupyter-viewer-xblockstars29 - Fetch and display part of, or an entire Jupyter Notebook in an Open edX XBlock.

    • Version Control

  • databooksstars74 - A command-line utility that eases versioning and sharing of notebooks.

    • Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • JupyterLab - Your Personal Data Science Workbench - Talk about JupyterLab at Full Stack Quants London.
  • List of Jupyter notebooks
  • List of Jupyter notebooks IIstars1.4k
  • The Littlest JupyterHub - JupyterHub distribution for 1-50 users on a single server; more lightweight than the Zero to JupyterHub setup.

    • Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • jupyterlab_nbconvert_nocodestars12 - NBConvert exporters for PDF/HTML export without code cells.

    • Testing

  • nbcelltestsstars65 - Cell-by-cell testing for notebooks in Jupyter.
  • sphinxcontrib-jupyterstars72 - Sphinx extension for generating Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 21st - Feb 27th, 2022
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • DataBlogs - DataBlogs is an open-source data journalism platform that converts Jupyter notebooks into published articles on the web.
  • DataCamp Workspace - Jupyter-backed data science notebooks with built-in collaboration and publishing functionality.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • stickylandstars247 - Break the linear presentation of notebooks with sticky cells.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 24th - Jan 30th, 2022
item.description:
Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Paperspace Gradient - A Jupyter-backed data science IDE with accelerated hardware (GPUs) and MLOps functionality.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 13th - Sep 19th, 2021
item.description:
Version Control

  • Neptune - Version, manage and share notebook checkpoints in your projects.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 16th - Aug 22nd, 2021
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • tabninestars28 - Tabnine AI auto completer extension.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Ganimedestars2 - Store, version, edit and execute notebooks in sandboxes and integrate them directly via REST interfaces.
  • Voilastars4.4k - Rendering of live Jupyter Notebooks with interactive widgets, allowing dashboarding based on Jupyter Notebooks.

    • Visualization

  • ipychartstars61 - Interactive Chart.js plots in Jupyter.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Visualization

  • Evidentlystars2.8k - Interactive reports to analyze machine learning models during validation or production monitoring.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Jupyter Bookstars3.1k - Build publication-quality books and documents from computational material.

    • Domain-Specific Projects

  • keplergl - Jupyter extension for visual exploration of large-scale geolocation data sets.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Visualization

  • luxstars4.3k - Recommends a set of visualizations whenever a dataframe is printed in a notebook.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • jutstars166 - CLI to nicely display notebooks in the terminal.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • ContainDS Dashboardsstars175 - JupyterHub extension to host authenticated scripts or notebooks in any framework (Voilà, Streamlit, Plotly Dash etc).

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • Guild AI - Execute notebooks as experiments to capture and compare results over time.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • nbgitpullerstars170 - Sync a git repository one-way to a local path.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • elyrastars1.5k - A visual editor for creating and running notebook (or Python script) pipelines locally or remotely.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Visualization

  • mpld3 - Combining Matplotlib and D3js for interactive data visualizations.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Jupytextstars5.6k - Convert and synchronize notebooks with text formats (e.g. Python or Markdown files) that work well under version control.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Domain-Specific Projects

  • Jupyletstars173 - Create 2D and 3D games, graphics, live music and sound interactively in a Jupyter notebook.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • jupyter-nbrequirementsstars14 - Dependency management and optimization in Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • nbQAstars607 - Run any standard Python code quality tool on a Jupyter Notebook, from the command-line or via pre-commit.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • nbflowstars152 - One-button reproducible workflows with Jupyter and Scons.
  • nbinteract - Create interactive webpages from Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • nbdevstars3.8k - Develop, package and distribute Python packages to PyPI using Jupyter as a Literate Programing environment.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
Testing

  • treebeardstars154 - GitHub Action for testing/scheduling Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Ploomberstars2.7k - Run a collection of notebooks and scripts in a reproducible manner using a pipeline.yaml file.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab_templatesstars313 - Notebook templates in JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • IllumiDeskstars39 - Docker-based JupyterHub + LTI + nbgrader distribution for education.

    • Runtimes/Frontends

  • Visual Studio Code - Native desktop notebook frontend.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Visualization

  • pd-replicatorstars9 - Copy a pandas DataFrame to the clipboard with one click.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Kapitsastars6 - CLI to search local Jupyter notebooks.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • debuggerstars544 - A visual debugger for Jupyter notebooks, consoles, and source files.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • How to Grow Neat Software Architecture out of Jupyter Notebooksstars514 - Article and video about growing a neat software architecture from notebooks.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Google Cloud AI Platform Notebooks - Managed JupyterLab notebook instances configured with GPU-enabled machine learning frameworks on Google Cloud Platform.
  • Google Cloud Dataproc Jupyter component - Jupyter and JupyterLab for Apache Spark using Google Cloud Dataproc.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Version Control

  • gitstars1.2k - Extension for git integration.
  • nbdimestars2.3k - Tools for diffing and merging of Jupyter notebooks.
  • ReviewNB - Code reviews for Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • shortcutuistars55 - An extension for managing keyboard shortcuts.

    • Testing

  • treonstars283 - Easy-to-use test framework for Jupyter Notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • lspstars5 - IDE-like features (code navigation, hover suggestions, linters, diagnostics, kernel-less autocompletion etc.)

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • code_formatterstars615 - A universal code formatter.
  • python-bytecodestars59 - Explore CPython Bytecode in JupyterLab.
  • quickopenstars75 - Quickly open a file in JupyterLab by typing part of its name.
  • sidecarstars203 - A sidecar output widget for JupyterLab.
  • sqlstars382 - SQL GUI for JupyterLab.
  • system-monitorstars255 - Extension to display system metrics.
  • theme-darculastars158 - A handsome Darcula theme for Jupyterlab.
  • topbarstars3 - Top Bar extension for JupyterLab.
  • vimstars926 - Vim notebook cell bindings.
  • nb_blackstars320 - Extension to keep Python code automatically formatted using blackstars29.8k.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • Beaker - Development environment with seamless data transmission from one language to another.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • ML Workspacestars2.8k - Docker image that includes Jupyter(Lab) and various packages for data science/machine learning.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Spell.run - End-to-end platform for machine learning and deep learning.
  • Deepnote - Jupyter-compatible data science notebook with real-time collaboration, versioning and easy deployment.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jul 29th - Aug 4th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • jp_doodlestars44 - Infrastructure for building special purpose interactive diagrams in 2D and 3D.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • tqdmstars23.1k - Fast, extensible progress bar for loops and iterables.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • jupyterlab_emailstars51 - Email notebooks and their content from within JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization

  • ipytreestars96 - Tree UI element for Jupyter.
  • xleafletstars74 - C++ Backend for ipyleaflet.
  • xwebrtcstars15 - C++ Backend for ipywebrtc.
  • xwidgetsstars129 - C++ Backend for ipywidgets.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Mar 11th - Mar 17th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes/Frontends

  • JupyterWithstars370 - Nix-based framework for the definition of declarative and reproducible Jupyter environments.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019
item.description:
Domain-Specific Projects

  • ArcGIS - Library for working with maps and geospatial data, powered by web GIS.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Jan 14th - Jan 20th, 2019
item.description:
Collaboration/Education

  • IPythonBlocksstars154 - Practice Python with colored grids in Jupyter.

    • Visualization

  • ipyleafletstars1.3k - Interactive visualization library for Leaflet.js maps in Jupyter notebooks.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
JupyterLab Extensions

  • go-to-definitionstars218 - Extension for navigating to the definition of a variable or function in JupyterLab.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Sep 3rd - Sep 9th, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • itk-jupyter-widgetsstars466 - Interactive widgets to visualize images in 2D and 3D.

    • Testing

  • ipyteststars238 - Test runner for running unit tests from within a notebook.

    • Community Resources

  • GitHub - Search: jupyter
  • PyPI - Framework :: Jupyter

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • jupyter-gmapsstars744 - Interactive visualization library for Google Maps in Jupyter notebooks.

    • JupyterLab Extensions

  • drawiostars545 - Extension that displays drawio/mxgraph diagrams.
  • latexstars533 - Extension for live editing of LaTeX documents.
  • variableinspectorstars940 - Variable inspector extension that shows variables and their values.
  • celltagsstars110 - Extension to organise and execute notebooks using cell tags.
  • google-drivestars373 - Extension for Google Drive integration.
  • tocstars723 - Extension that provides a table of contents for notebooks.
  • voyagerstars275 - Extension to view CSV and JSON data in Voyager.

item.title: markusschanta/awesome-jupyter Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Visualization

  • pyechartsstars12.8k - Python interface for the EChartsstars53k visualization library.
  • Altairstars7.8k - Declarative visualization library for Python, based on Vega and Vega-Litestars3.9k.
  • Bokeh - Interactive visualization library that targets modern web browsers for presentation.
  • bqplotstars3.4k - Grammar of Graphics-based interactive plotting framework for Jupyter.
  • pythreejsstars834 - Python / ThreeJS bridge utilizing the Jupyter widget infrastructure.
  • Qgridstars2.9k - Interactive grid for sorting, filtering, and editing DataFrames in Jupyter notebooks.

    • Collaboration/Education

  • jupyter-edx-grader-xblockstars42 - Auto-grade a student assignment created as a Jupyter notebook and write the score in the Open edX gradebook.
  • callgraphstars61 - Magic to display a function call graph.
  • jupyter-drivestars413 - Google drive for Jupyter.
  • LTI Launch JupyterHub Authenticatorstars56 - Authentication via Edx.
  • nbautoevalstars17 - Create auto-evaluated exercises.
  • nbgraderstars1.1k - Assigning and grading of Jupyter notebooks.
  • nbtutorstars413 - Visualize Python code execution (line-by-line).

    • Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • rst2ipynbstars14 - Convert standalone reStructuredText files to Jupyter notebook file.
  • Binder - Turn a GitHub repo into a collection of interactive notebooks.
  • Nikola - Static Site Generator that converts notebooks into websites.
  • Bookbookstars95 - Bookbook converts a set of notebooks in a directory to HTML or PDF, preserving cross references within and between notebooks.
  • nbscanstars22 - Search for and print cells contents of Jupyter notebooks.
  • notedownstars833 - Convert Jupyter notebooks to markdown (and back).
  • Papermillstars4.9k - Tool for parameterizing, executing, and analyzing Jupyter notebooks.
  • pynbstars238 - Jupyter Notebooks as plain Python code with embedded Markdown text.
  • RISEstars3.4k - Reveal.js Jupyter/IPython Slideshow.

    • Domain-Specific Projects

  • GenePattern Notebook - Integrating Genomic Analysis with Interactive Notebooks.
  • GeoNotebookstars1.1k - Extension for exploratory geospatial analysis.
  • lolvizstars779 - Data-structure visualization tool for lists of lists, lists, dictionaries.
  • Quantopian Notebooks - Jupyter-based platform for financial research.
  • vpython-jupyterstars65 - VPython 3D engine running in a Jupyter notebook.

    • Hosted Notebook Solutions

  • Azure Notebooks - Jupyter notebooks running in the cloud on Microsoft Azure.
  • CoCalc - Notebooks with 17 supported kernel types, course management, LaTeX document authoring, simultaneous document editing and integration with the SageMath computer algebra system.
  • Domino Data Lab - Data science platform with integrated collaboration tools, environment management and compute grid.
  • Anaconda Enterprise - Multi-user collaboration and one-click deployment of models, notebooks, and dashboards.
  • PAWS - Jupyter notebook deployment customized for interacting with Wikimedia wikis.

    • Official Resources and Documentation

  • Try Jupyter - Try Jupyter in your browser.
  • Jupyter kernels - List of all programming languages available as Jupyter kernels.
  • Making kernels for Jupyter

    • Runtimes/Frontends

  • docker-stacksstars6.9k - Hierarchical stacks of ready-to-run Jupyter applications in Docker.
  • Hydrogenstars3.8k - Run code inline in Atom using Jupyter kernels.
  • Jupyter Notebookstars9.5k - Main Jupyter notebook runtime.
  • JupyterHubstars6.9k - Multi-user server for Jupyter.
  • JupyterLabstars12.4k - JupyterLab is the next generation user interface for Jupyter.
  • kaggle/docker-pythonstars2k - Kaggle Python docker image that includes datasets and packages.
  • nteractstars5.9k - Native desktop notebook frontend.
  • Stencilastars652 - Native desktop notebook frontend.

    • Testing

  • nbvalstars386 - Py.test plugin for validating Jupyter notebooks.
  • nosebookstars79 - Nose plugin for finding and running IPython notebooks as nose tests.

    • Community Resources

  • Conference Talks - PyVideo.org, JupyterCon

    • Articles/Guides/Tutorials

  • Exploratory computing with Python - Collection of notebooks covering scientific computing.
  • Install and run a Jupyter notebook in a Google Cloud Dataproc cluster
  • Interactive Web Plotting with Bokehstars689
  • Jupyter Notebook Extensions
  • Jupyter Notebook Themesstars9.3k
  • Jupyter tips, tricks and shortcuts
  • Lectures on scientific computing with Pythonstars3.3k
  • pytudesstars19.2k - List of Jupyter Notebooks by Peter Norvig.
  • ResGuides: research with Jupyter
  • Zero to JupyterHub - Tutorial to help install and manage JupyterHub.
